name: moodmate-root
description: 1,000,000% Professional Master Root for MoodMate (Capstone Final Submission)

scripts.update:all: cd backend && npm run update:all && cd .. && cd frontend && npm run update:all
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm run install:all
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd .. && cd frontend && npm install
